name: Cinnamon Cookie
description: Cinnamon Cookie – a cinnamon bomb for espresso! Brazil Albertina, which we have in our cafes and online store, is a great coffee on its own. It's sweet, creamy, and chocolaty. It has all the characteristics that won't bore you even after a year – it will remain a good companion.

name: City Espresso Blend
description: City Blend is a carefully mixed blend of arabica and robusta, which represents a great choice for all who prefer a more bitter coffee taste. This coffee isn't burnt, but skillfully roasted and dark just right.

name: Indonesia Team Pegasing
description: The coffee was quite expensive to purchase, almost the most expensive we've ever bought, but we simply couldn't resist this gem! Very distinctive and sweet in the cup, original, different... and also one that was missing from our wide portfolio of coffees.

name: Marshmallow crush
description: Marshmallow crush – a sweet bomb for Filter. Filter coffee lovers, attention! We present this year's top specialty for filter, Colombia Scarlet Extreme with cupping score 88.25, which tastes like marshmallow, vanilla, and strawberries.

name: Colombia Edwin Noreña Ruby
description: Beautiful new coffee from The Coffee Quest from Colombia! It's the second of our three favorites that completely enchanted us during cupping with its exceptional aroma, sweet and amazingly fruity taste, that nearly made our jaws drop!

name: Costa Rica Las Lajas
description: A beautiful coffee from Costa Rica with honey processing that brings out delightful floral and citrus notes. The coffee is grown at high altitudes which contributes to its complex flavor profile.

name: Rwanda Huye Mountain
description: A delightful coffee from the Huye region of Rwanda, known for its bright berry notes and caramel sweetness. This coffee is perfect for those who enjoy a balanced cup with subtle complexity.

name: Burundi Nemba Oro Anaerobic
description: Another coffee that stands out and will please lovers of expressive coffees. Fermented, anaerobically processed, and with higher fruitiness. That's Burundi Nemba Oro.

name: Colombia Tumbaga decaf
description: We wouldn't know the difference! That's how good this coffee is. Decaf, meaning anyone who has issues with this stimulant can start rejoicing. Similarly, you can enjoy a few cups of coffee before sleep without having to limit yourself in taste in any way.
